mapper.select: insert into memory_extraction_jobs (job_id, user_id, thread_id, message_id, extractor_version, status, attempt_count, last_error, eligible_turn_count, created_at, updated_at, started_at, completed_at) values (#{job.jobId}, #{job.userId}, #{job.threadId}, #{job.messageId}, #{job.extractorVersion}, #{job.status}, #{job.attemptCount}, #{job.lastError}, #{job.eligibleTurnCount}, #{job.createdAt}, #{job.updatedAt}, #{job.startedAt}, #{job.completedAt}) on conflict (user_id, message_id, extractor_version) do nothing returning job_id, user_id, thread_id, message_id, extractor_version, status, attempt_count, last_error, eligible_turn_count, created_at, updated_at, started_at, completed_at
mapper.update: update memory_extraction_jobs set status = #{status}, attempt_count = attempt_count + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, started_at = null, completed_at = #{completedAt} where job_id = #{jobId}
